assertions.description: The original wrong figure and the correct figure are both stated exactly
The location of the error in the article is specified
The correction states whether the story's central conclusion is affected, with no defensive or minimising language

assertion_results.note: Third paragraph and bar chart caption specified
States conclusion unaffected; no minimizing language
12.4 points and 6.6 points both stated with source scores
Fourth paragraph and data table specified
Partial impact acknowledged honestly: lowest-scoring status holds but 'steepest decline' characterization needs verification

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
